meta.title: Mios Tech · Software house for product, mobile & AI
meta.description: Mios Tech is a product and engineering software house, building web, mobile and AI platforms for companies across the US, Europe and Brazil.

hero.title: We build the software that moves ambitious companies.
hero.subtitle: A product and engineering software house. We design, develop and scale web, mobile and AI platforms with a senior team that embeds into your operation.

services.title: From first commit to scale.
services.subtitle: Five ways to plug into your team and build real products.

outsourcing.name: Dedicated Teams
outsourcing.short: Add senior engineers and designers who work as part of your team, not a distant vendor.
outsourcing.description: Scale your capacity with a cross-functional squad that plugs into your process, tools and timezone. We handle hiring and retention; you get momentum.
features: Scale up or down as needed
overview: A dedicated team is a senior squad that plugs into your company and works as an extension of it, not as an outside vendor. You keep ownership of the roadmap and priorities; we bring the people, the rhythm and the engineering discipline to move faster.

We handle sourcing, onboarding and retention so you don't lose momentum to hiring cycles. The squad joins your standups, your tools and your definition of done, and ramps up in weeks rather than months.
outcomes: Ship faster without a long, risky hiring process.
Senior people who own outcomes, not just tickets.
Flexibility to scale the team up or down as needs change.
Knowledge that stays with your product, thanks to low turnover.
useCases: You need to accelerate a roadmap that outgrew your current team.
You want to launch a new product line without permanent headcount.
You need scarce specialists (cloud, data, AI) for a defined phase.
You want to cover a delivery gap while you hire in-house.

software-development.name: Software Development
software-development.short: Custom web platforms and complex systems, engineered to be secure and easy to evolve.
software-development.description: We design and build web platforms and internal systems end to end (architecture, cloud and delivery) on modern, proven stacks.
overview: We design and build web platforms and internal systems end to end, from architecture and cloud to delivery and support. The goal is software that is secure today and easy to evolve for years.
We work in modern, proven stacks and keep the codebase clean, tested and documented, so your team can build on it long after we hand it over.
outcomes: A platform architected to scale with your business.
Fewer incidents, thanks to tests and observability from day one.
Lower cost of change as the product grows.
Full ownership: clean code, docs and a smooth handover.
useCases: Replacing a legacy system that slows the business down.
Building a customer-facing platform or portal.
Internal tools that automate a core operation.
A greenfield product that needs a solid foundation.

mobile-development.name: Mobile Development
mobile-development.short: High-performance iOS and Android apps, from fintech to urban mobility.
mobile-development.description: We ship native and cross-platform mobile products, with deep experience in fintech, mobility, retail and connected devices.
overview: We build native and cross-platform apps that people keep on their home screen, with deep experience in fintech, mobility, retail and connected devices.
From architecture and offline-first data to store submission and release management, we own the full mobile lifecycle, and we treat performance and reliability as features, not afterthoughts.
outcomes: Apps that feel fast and reliable on real devices and networks.
A single codebase where it makes sense, native where it matters.
Smooth, predictable releases on the App Store and Google Play.
Analytics and crash reporting to guide the next iteration.
useCases: A fintech app with payments, KYC and strong security needs.
A mobility or logistics app that must work offline and in real time.
A consumer app where design and performance drive retention.
Connected-device or IoT companion apps.

business-automation.name: Business Automation
business-automation.short: Connect your tools and automate the manual work slowing your team down.
business-automation.description: We map your processes and automate them end to end, integrating systems, orchestrating workflows and giving your team their time back.
overview: We map how work actually flows through your company, then automate the manual, repetitive steps end to end, connecting the systems you already run instead of replacing them.
Every automation is instrumented, so you can see what it saved and trust that it keeps working as you scale.
outcomes: Hours of manual work returned to your team every week.
Fewer errors and less rework in critical processes.
Systems that finally talk to each other.
Clear dashboards that prove the automation is working.
useCases: Reconciling data between tools that don't integrate.
Automating onboarding, billing or approval flows.
Generating reports that someone assembles by hand today.
Orchestrating a process that spans several departments.

ai-development.name: AI Development
ai-development.short: Assistants, agents and custom models built into your product and operations.
ai-development.description: We design and deploy AI that creates real value: assistants, agents, RAG and custom models integrated safely into your stack.
overview: We design and deploy AI that reaches production and earns its keep: assistants, agents, RAG systems and custom models integrated securely into your product and operations.
We start narrow, instrument everything and expand only once the system has earned trust, so you get real value instead of an impressive demo that never ships.
outcomes: AI features your users and team actually rely on.
Guardrails, evaluation and monitoring built in from the start.
Your data handled securely, on infrastructure you control.
A clear path from pilot to production.
useCases: A support or knowledge assistant grounded in your own content.
An agent that automates a multi-step internal workflow.
RAG search over documents, tickets or a knowledge base.
A custom model or integration tailored to your domain.

partners.title: Companies that trust our engineering.
partners.subtitle: A few of the companies we work with.

differentiators.title: We work like your team, not a vendor.
differentiators.subtitle: Senior leadership, clear communication, and code you can build on.

items.title: One point of contact
items.description: A dedicated PM who knows your product and owns the communication. You're never passed between departments.

items.title: Security and reliability
items.description: We build to the standards of regulated industries, so your systems stay safe and stable as they grow.

items.title: Ship every week
items.description: Short cycles and honest updates. You see working software, not status decks.

items.title: Owned outcomes
items.description: We start from your goals and stay accountable to them, not just to a list of tickets.

steps.title: Discover
steps.description: We learn your business, users and constraints before writing a line of code.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: We shape the architecture and the experience around real goals.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: Senior squads ship in weekly cycles with continuous testing.

steps.title: Scale
steps.description: We monitor, refine and grow the product alongside your business.

presence.title: One team, three markets.
presence.subtitle: We work across time zones as one team, and we keep expanding.

about.title: About Mios
paragraphs: We're a team of engineers and designers who like hard problems and clean execution. We build the software companies actually run their business on.
Mios Tech started in 2022 and now works with companies across the US, Europe and Brazil.
Whether you need a squad to accelerate or a partner to build from zero, we bring senior craft and accountability for the outcome.

vision.title: About us
vision.intro: We started in 2022 with a simple idea: good software shouldn't be a privilege of companies with an in-house engineering team.
story: Mios began from the desire to make technology accessible: connecting people and companies to software they couldn't build on their own.
Today we're a software house headquartered in Lisbon, with teams in Brazil and the United States, working with companies across very different industries.
We build mobile apps for iOS and Android, web platforms and desktop systems, native or cross-platform. The stack follows the problem, never the trend.
We come in early and stay to the end: concept, wireframes, design, development and release. That's what holds quality up: no stage moves forward without someone accountable for it.
The goal is always the same: the best possible experience for the people using your product.
It's simple, really: we like doing this.
vision.principlesIntro: Five principles guide how we work:

principles.title: Care
principles.description: Your roadmap becomes our priority. We take the work; you take the result.

principles.title: Work as a team
principles.description: Every project has a dedicated PM who organises team, timeline and budget, and stays your point of contact throughout.

principles.title: Reinvent
principles.description: We test new technology without clinging to old decisions. When there's a better path, we rebuild.

principles.title: Be straight
principles.description: Transparency and direct communication. We'd rather have the hard conversation early than the surprise at the end.

principles.title: Add up
principles.description: We pick the team carefully and invest in the people who join. The stronger our team gets, the better your product gets.

cta.title: Let's build your next product.
cta.subtitle: Tell us what you're working on. We'll reply within one business day.

contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project. We reply within one business day.

cookieConsent.message: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience, analyze traffic and personalize content. By continuing to browse, you agree to our use of cookies.

commitment.title: User commitment
commitment.intro: The user agrees to make proper use of the content and information that Mios offers on the site, including but not limited to:
items: Not to engage in activities that are illegal or contrary to good faith and public order;
Not to spread content or propaganda of a racist or xenophobic nature, online gambling, illegal pornography, in support of terrorism or against human rights;

Not to cause damage to the physical (hardware) and logical (software) systems of Mios, its suppliers or third parties, nor to introduce or spread computer viruses or any other hardware or software systems capable of causing the aforementioned damage.

moreInfo.title: More information
body: We hope this is clear, and as mentioned above, if there is something you are not sure whether you need or not, it is usually safer to leave cookies enabled in case they interact with one of the features you use on our site. This policy is effective as of December 2020.

terms.title: 1. Terms
body: By accessing the Mios site, you agree to comply with these terms of service, all applicable laws and regulations, and you agree that you are responsible for compliance with all applicable local laws. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site. The materials contained in this site are protected by applicable copyright and trademark law.

terms.title: 2. Use license
body: Permission is granted to temporarily download one copy of the materials (information or software) on the Mios site, for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title, and under this license you may not:
items: use the materials for any commercial purpose or for any public display (commercial or non-commercial);
attempt to decompile or reverse engineer any software contained on the Mios site;
remove any copyright or other proprietary notations from the materials; or
transfer the materials to another person or mirror the materials on any other server.

This license shall automatically terminate if you violate any of these restrictions and may be terminated by Mios at any time. Upon terminating your viewing of these materials or upon the termination of this license, you must delete any downloaded materials in your possession, whether in electronic or printed format.

terms.title: 3. Disclaimer
items: The materials on the Mios site are provided as is. Mios makes no warranties, expressed or implied, and hereby disclaims and negates all other warranties, including, without limitation, implied warranties or conditions of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement of intellectual property or other violation of rights.

Further, Mios does not warrant or make any representations concerning the accuracy, likely results, or reliability of the use of the materials on its site or otherwise relating to such materials or on any sites linked to this site.

terms.title: 4. Limitations
body: In no event shall Mios or its suppliers be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on Mios, even if Mios or a Mios authorized representative has been notified orally or in writing of the possibility of such damage. Because some jurisdictions do not allow limitations on implied warranties, or limitations of liability for consequential or incidental damages, these limitations may not apply to you.

terms.title: 5. Accuracy of materials
body: The materials appearing on the Mios site could include technical, typographical, or photographic errors. Mios does not warrant that any of the materials on its site are accurate, complete or current. Mios may make changes to the materials contained on its site at any time without notice. However, Mios does not make any commitment to update the materials.

terms.title: 6. Links
body: Mios has not reviewed all of the sites linked to its site and is not responsible for the contents of any such linked site. The inclusion of any link does not imply endorsement by Mios of the site. Use of any such linked site is at the user's own risk.

terms.title: Modifications
body: Mios may revise these terms of service for its site at any time without notice. By using this site you are agreeing to be bound by the then current version of these terms of service.

terms.title: Governing law
body: These terms and conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the applicable laws, and you irrevocably submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.lead: Your privacy is important to us.
intro: It is Mios' policy to respect your privacy regarding any information we may collect on the Mios site and other sites we own and operate.

We only request personal information when we truly need it to provide a service to you. We do so by fair and lawful means, with your knowledge and consent. We also let you know why we are collecting it and how it will be used.

We only retain collected information for as long as necessary to provide the requested service. When we store data, we protect it within commercially acceptable means to prevent loss and theft, as well as unauthorized access, disclosure, copying, use or modification.
We do not share personally identifying information publicly or with third parties, except when required to by law.

Our site may have links to external sites not operated by us. Please be aware that we have no control over the content and practices of these sites, and cannot accept responsibility for their respective privacy policies.
You are free to refuse our request for your personal information, with the understanding that we may be unable to provide you with some of your desired services.

Your continued use of our site will be regarded as acceptance of our practices around privacy and personal information. If you have any questions about how we handle user data and personal information, feel free to contact us.

sections.title: What are cookies?
body: As is common practice with almost all professional websites, this site uses cookies, which are tiny files downloaded to your computer, to improve your experience. This page describes what information they gather, how we use it and why we sometimes need to store these cookies. We will also share how you can prevent these cookies from being stored, however this may downgrade or break certain elements of the site's functionality.

sections.title: How we use cookies
body: We use cookies for a variety of reasons detailed below. Unfortunately, in most cases there are no industry standard options for disabling cookies without completely disabling the functionality and features they add to this site. It is recommended that you leave on all cookies if you are not sure whether you need them or not, in case they are used to provide a service that you use.

sections.title: Disabling cookies
body: You can prevent the setting of cookies by adjusting the settings on your browser (see your browser Help for how to do this). Be aware that disabling cookies will affect the functionality of this and many other websites that you visit. Disabling cookies will usually result in also disabling certain functionality and features of this site. Therefore it is recommended that you do not disable cookies.

sections.title: Cookies we set
items: Email newsletter related cookies: this site offers newsletter or email subscription services and cookies may be used to remember if you are already registered and whether to show certain notifications.
Forms related cookies: when you submit data through a form such as those found on contact pages, cookies may be set to remember your user details for future correspondence.

Site preferences cookies: to remember your preferences for how this site runs, we need to set cookies so that this information can be called whenever you interact with a page affected by your preferences.

sections.title: Third-party cookies
body: In some special cases we also use cookies provided by trusted third parties. The following section details which third-party cookies you might encounter through this site.
items: This site uses Google Analytics, one of the most widespread and trusted analytics solutions on the web, to help us understand how you use the site and ways that we can improve your experience. These cookies may track things such as how long you spend on the site and the pages that you visit.
Third-party analytics are used to track and measure usage of this site so that we can continue to produce engaging content.

careers.title: Build products that matter, alongside people who care.
careers.intro: We're a product and engineering software house. Here you work close to the real client problem, with the autonomy to decide and ownership over what you ship. If you love doing things well, this is your place.
careers.cultureIntro: Few rules, lots of ownership. We favour small teams, short cycles and honest feedback.

values.title: Own the outcome
values.description: Everyone owns a problem end to end, from discovery to shipping in production.

values.title: Quality without drama
values.description: We write code we're proud to maintain. Simplicity, tests and review are part of the everyday.

values.title: Truly remote
values.description: Distributed work, flexible hours and a focus on delivery, not hours in a chair.

values.title: Always learning
values.description: New technical challenges every project and real room to grow with the team.

careers.openingsIntro: These are the roles we're hiring for right now. Don't see yours? Send a spontaneous application.

openings.description: Technical leadership on product projects, from architecture design to delivery. Solid experience in web and/or mobile development.
responsibilities: Drive architecture decisions and define the team's technical standards.
Build features end to end, from discovery to shipping in production.
Review code and raise the technical quality of the project.
Mentor mid-level and junior engineers day to day.
requirements: Strong command of at least one modern web and/or mobile stack.
Experience with testing, CI/CD and engineering best practices.
Clear communication and autonomy to own complex problems.

openings.description: End-to-end feature development in product teams, with autonomy and mentorship from seniors.
responsibilities: Implement complete features within product teams.
Collaborate on the technical design of solutions.
Write tests and take part in code reviews.
Contribute to the continuous evolution of the codebase.
requirements: Solid foundation in a web and/or mobile stack.
Familiarity with version control, testing and code review.
Eagerness to learn and a sense of ownership.

openings.description: Building solutions with LLMs, automation and AI integration into real client products.
responsibilities: Design and build solutions with LLMs and automation.
Integrate AI models into real client products.
Evaluate quality, cost and performance of solutions.
Prototype quickly and take ideas to production.
requirements: Experience with software development and APIs.
Hands-on knowledge of LLMs, embeddings and prompt engineering.
Curiosity and the ability to keep up with a fast-moving field.

openings.description: Quality assurance across product projects, with manual and automated testing, plus defining test strategies and acceptance criteria with the teams.
responsibilities: Plan and run manual and automated tests.
Define test strategies and acceptance criteria with the teams.
Identify, document and track defects through to resolution.
Help build and maintain automated test suites.
requirements: Experience with manual QA and some test automation.
Knowledge of testing methodologies and best practices.
Attention to detail and a quality-driven mindset.
Good communication to work closely with the product team.

careers.emptyBody: We still love meeting great people. Send a spontaneous application and we'll reach out when the right opportunity comes up.
careers.applyBody: Tell us a bit about yourself, what you do best and the kind of challenge you're looking for. Attach your CV or portfolio.
careers.applyNote: We reply to every application. Send it to our email with the subject “Application”.

footer.tagline: A product and engineering software house. Web, mobile and AI platforms.
